subtitles.original: ラスト、いってみよう！
subtitles.english: Let's go for the last one!

subtitles.original: 押せよ そのリセットボタン
subtitles.english: Press it, that reset button

subtitles.original: 消せよ 前のソラの価値観
subtitles.english: Erase it, the values of the previous Sora

subtitles.original: 本当はもう二度と 戻ってこれないから
subtitles.english: Because actually, we can never return again

subtitles.original: 調子に乗らせて 乗らせてみるのが楽でいいのかも
subtitles.english: Maybe letting me get carried away...

subtitles.original: しれないな
subtitles.english: ...is easier and better.

subtitles.original: はい！ ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Alright! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: この曲、「トラッシュ・トラッシュ」を歌わせていただきました！
subtitles.english: I sang the song, "Trash Trash"!

subtitles.original: そして、この曲ではなんと、サングラスをかけたあんきもがやってきました！
subtitles.english: And for this song, Ankimo showed up wearing sunglasses!

subtitles.original: どうしてサングラス？
subtitles.english: Why the sunglasses?

subtitles.original: わあ、取れた！
subtitles.english: Oh, they came off!

subtitles.original: 遊ぶんじゃないの、もう。
subtitles.english: Stop playing around already!

subtitles.original: というわけで、久々にね、あんきもと一緒に何か踊った気がするんだけど、どう？
subtitles.english: So, I feel like it's been a while since I danced with Ankimo. How was it?

subtitles.original: 5人目のゲスト、あんきもです！
subtitles.english: Our fifth guest, Ankimo!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: ある意味、シークレットだった、めっちゃ踊るやん！
subtitles.english: In a way, you were a secret guest. You danced so much!

subtitles.original: ふふふ、そしてね、そんな感じで
subtitles.english: Hehe, and well, like that...

subtitles.original: まだね、最後にね、ちょっとお披露目もあるんだけど
subtitles.english: We still have a little announcement at the end, but...

subtitles.original: ここでね、まず恒例の
subtitles.english: first, we have the usual...

subtitles.original: お知らせがたくさんあるので
subtitles.english: lots of announcements for you!

subtitles.original: ここからはあんきもも一緒に告知していこうね！
subtitles.english: So Ankimo and I will share them with you together!

subtitles.original: 聞いてください。
subtitles.english: Please listen up.

subtitles.original: まずは、こちら！
subtitles.english: First up, this one!

subtitles.original: ときのそら誕生日記念2024グッズです！
subtitles.english: Tokino Sora Birthday Commemoration 2024 Goods!

subtitles.original: 順番に紹介していくよ！
subtitles.english: We'll introduce them one by one!

subtitles.original: まずは、こちら！
subtitles.english: First is this!

subtitles.original: Dream! そらとも法被！
subtitles.english: Dream! Soratomo Happi!

subtitles.original: イラストは、あるだん先生です！
subtitles.english: The illustration is by Arudan-sensei!

subtitles.original: テーマはライブをしている私ということで、なんとあんきももいっぱいいるんだよ。
subtitles.english: The theme is me performing live, and there are actually lots of Ankimo too!

subtitles.original: ね！
subtitles.english: Right?

subtitles.original: あの、今までもオリジナル法被自体はイベントとかで出たことはあるんですけど
subtitles.english: We've released original happi coats at events before...

subtitles.original: 自分でオリジナルで作るのは初めてだったので
subtitles.english: but this is the first time I've custom-made my own original one!

subtitles.original: ぜひライブで着てきてほしいなと思って作りました！
subtitles.english: So I made it hoping you'd wear it to my lives!

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひみんな
subtitles.english: Please, everyone...

subtitles.original: 楽しんでくださいね！ライブに来てください！
subtitles.english: enjoy it and come to the live!

subtitles.original: 続いては、こちら！
subtitles.english: Next is this!

subtitles.original: 「お部屋でのんびり」ワイドラバーマット！
subtitles.english: "Relaxing in My Room" Wide Rubber Mat!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！ イラストは、しわすたかし先生です！
subtitles.english: Yay! The illustration is by Shiwatsu Takashi-sensei!

subtitles.original: テーマは部屋でファンレターを読んでいる私で、こちらね、ホロカの
subtitles.english: The theme is me reading fan letters in my room, and this is just the right size...

subtitles.original: やつにね、ちょうどいいサイズになってるので
subtitles.english: for the HoloKa cards...

subtitles.original: ホロカを遊ぶ方、ぜひぜひ
subtitles.english: so if you play HoloKa, please...

subtitles.original: 一緒にね、あの、持って行って遊んでもらえたら嬉しいなと思います！
subtitles.english: bring it along and play with it! I'd be so happy!

subtitles.original: 続いては、こちら！
subtitles.english: Next up is this!

subtitles.original: そらとおそろいスマホリング！
subtitles.english: Matching Smartphone Ring with Sora!

subtitles.original: ということでね、前回販売したDJそらパーカーとデザインが一緒
subtitles.english: This has the same design as the DJ Sora Hoodie we sold last time...

subtitles.original: なので、それと一緒にね、合わせてスマホも私とおそろっち
subtitles.english: so you can match your phone with me!

subtitles.original: にしませんか？っていう感じです！
subtitles.english: Won't you match with me?

subtitles.original: そして、続いてはこちら！
subtitles.english: And next is this!

subtitles.original: そらザウルスなりきりそらちゃんぬいぐるみ！
subtitles.english: Sorasaurs Cosplay Sora-chan Plushie!

subtitles.original: みんな、みんながあまりにもさ、そらザウルスそらザウルスって言うからさ
subtitles.english: Since everyone kept saying "Sorasaurs, Sorasaurs"...

subtitles.original: でもそらザウルス自体を言うのはちょっと恥ずかしかったから
subtitles.english: but saying "Sorasaurs" itself was a bit embarrassing...

subtitles.original: そらちゃんぬいぐるみ、私が着ていることにするなりきりぬいぐるみにしました！
subtitles.english: so I made a cosplay plushie where I'm wearing it!

subtitles.original: しかもね、あのね、何そらザウルスって思う人、これ取るとフードがね
subtitles.english: And for those wondering what Sorasaurs is, if you take off the hood...

subtitles.original: 取れると、もうピンクの衣装を着てる私みたいになるので
subtitles.english: I look like I'm just wearing my pink outfit!

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひフードを取り外して可愛くね、持ち歩いてくれてもいいんじゃないかなと思います！
subtitles.english: So please feel free to take off the hood and carry it around with you!

subtitles.original: そして、最後はこちら！
subtitles.english: And finally, this!

subtitles.original: ボイス！
subtitles.english: Voices!

subtitles.original: ASMRボイス、ボイスタイトル「届いてるよ、きみの応援」
subtitles.english: ASMR voice, titled "I can hear your support."

subtitles.original: ということで、部屋でファンレターを読んでいるシチュエーションになっておりますので
subtitles.english: It's a scenario where I'm reading fan letters in my room...

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひ皆さん、どんな風にファンレター読んでるのかなと想像しながら聞いてもらえたら嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: so please listen to it while imagining how I read your letters!

subtitles.original: そして、フルセット購入特典はこちら！
subtitles.english: And here's the Full Set Purchase Bonus!

subtitles.original: 直筆サイン入り＆箔押し複製メッセージ入りポストカードと
subtitles.english: A postcard with a handwritten signature & foil-stamped message...

subtitles.original: 特典ボイス、ボイスタイトルは「誕生日を迎えて」になります！
subtitles.english: and a bonus voice titled "Welcoming My Birthday"!

subtitles.original: というわけでですね、あの、皆さん急がなくて大丈夫です。
subtitles.english: So everyone, there's no need to rush.

subtitles.original: 数量限定ではございませんので、皆さん全員分の
subtitles.english: They are not limited in quantity, so I will sign...

subtitles.original: サインを書かせていただきます！
subtitles.english: for every single one of you!

subtitles.original: いくらでも書きますので、ぜひぜひ皆さん
subtitles.english: I'll sign as many as it takes, so please...

subtitles.original: たくさんの人にグッズを買ってもらえたら私はとても、そらちお大喜び！
subtitles.english: if many people get the goods, I'll be super, super happy!

subtitles.original: なので、よろしくお願いいたします！
subtitles.english: So please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: 以上、ときのそら誕生日記念2024グッズでした！ みんなよろしくね！
subtitles.english: That's all for the Tokino Sora Birthday Commemoration 2024 Goods! Thank you, everyone!

subtitles.original: 続いてのお知らせは、こちら！
subtitles.english: The next announcement is this!

subtitles.original: 大急ぎで駆け足で！ 11月ワンマンライブのときのそら生誕記念先行チケット販売開始！
subtitles.english: In a hurry, let's be quick! Pre-sales have begun for the Tokino Sora Birthday Concert in November!

subtitles.original: ということで、ぴあアリーナのですね、先行チケットが本日から始まっております！
subtitles.english: The ticket pre-sales for Pia Arena MM start today!

subtitles.original: ぴあアリーナ、え、ファンクラブに入ってる人しかできないんじゃないかって言ってた人！
subtitles.english: For those who thought it's only open to Fan Club members...

subtitles.original: 本日から一般の皆さんも、え、販売が開始されておりますので
subtitles.english: sales for the general public have also started today!

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひ！もう12時から開始されております！
subtitles.english: So please! It has already started since 12:00!

subtitles.original: 応募していただけたら嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I'd be so happy if you apply!

subtitles.original: みんなでぴあアリーナでライブ楽しもう！
subtitles.english: Let's all enjoy the live at Pia Arena!

subtitles.original: さらに、こちら！
subtitles.english: And furthermore, this!

subtitles.original: その現地チケットの特典でもらえるホロカのお披露目！これもお披露目でございました！
subtitles.english: An unveiling of the HoloKa card you get as a venue ticket bonus!

subtitles.original: ライブの来場者特典として、限定ホロカが1枚配られます！
subtitles.english: As an attendee bonus, you'll receive one limited HoloKa card!

subtitles.original: 全2種類のうち、1枚をランダムでお渡しするのですが、そちらの1枚を公開です！
subtitles.english: One of the two types will be given randomly, and here is one of them!

subtitles.original: 私が描き下ろすということで、もう1個の方は
subtitles.english: This one is illustrated by me, and the other one...

subtitles.original: まだなので、えー
subtitles.english: is still under wraps, so...

responses.thoughts:
**My Processing of the Subtitle Task**

Okay, here's the breakdown of my thinking and actions for creating the subtitles. The user clearly wants accurate subtitles from the video segment, so that's the primary directive, and I'm treating this as a very precise transcription and translation task, as if this were my field and my task.

First, the user is looking for subtitles from the beginning of the video until the end, so I'll begin by transcribing the audio, and I need to use the `default_api:final_result` tool to output the results.

The initial transcription is simple: the user begins with a song. Right at the start, there is some back-and-forth about the exact phrase. Is it "ラスト1曲いってみよう！", "ラストいってみよう！", "ラスト1曲いくぜ！", or "ラストいくぞ！"? It's crucial I get this exactly right, because it sets the tone. After several listens and checks with the audio, I've confirmed it's "ラスト、いってみよう！".

Next, I need to identify the song. The provided reference initially suggested "Dream Story", but the lyrics I'm hearing are clearly not that song. The lyrics at the start are definitely "おせよ そのリセットボタン" and the like. This is where things get interesting, since I recognize the user's focus on accuracy, so I must decode the lyrics.

My first thought: is this "Reset Button"? No. I then compare to another song, since the lyrics I'm hearing are so familiar: "Trash Trash"! This is an important step. I must be precise because the user is an expert. There's another thought about lyrics which are similar.

The lyrics I'm hearing are:

*   "押せよ そのリセットボタン"
*   "消せよ 前のソラの価値観"
*   "本当はもう二度と 戻ってこれないから"
*   "調子に乗らせて 乗らせてみるのが楽でいいのかもしれないな"

My conclusion is that this is "Trash Trash" by KurageP, *not* the initially suggested track. I double-checked the lyrics, since the lyrics could be different. I must be exact! So I'm ditching the incorrect reference (Dream Story) and will need to create the subtitles based on the actual lyrics in the video.

Thus, the transcription of the vocals, to be accurate, needs to be done manually, now that I have the correct song title. And I need to output these with proper timestamps. I'm focusing on providing extremely precise timings, from the initial "ラスト" right through each line until "しれないな".

So, I meticulously transcribe, line by line, the vocal timings, making sure I accurately capture the phrase splits. At the end, I check once again that the line splits are accurate.

Once I have the transcription done, the translation is easy: I'm performing translation and making sure the lyrics have their correct meanings.

The second part of the video starts with the user speaking. I'm carefully transcribing everything, including interjections. I make sure I am doing an accurate transcription!

There is also a second segment where the user is explaining a bunch of merchandise for sale. I will need to be exact about it.

I must note the following: there is merchandise, and an announcement about a concert.

The user mentions "Tokino Sora Birthday Commemoration 2026 Goods". There is a quick check: I must check for an error. The user is checking the screen and the hashtag: #ときのそらお披露目誕生日2024. This confirms it is "Tokino Sora Birthday Commemoration 2024 Goods". I update it, I will check the audio: and the timing, since "2024" sounds similar to "2026".

I then transcribe the user's description of each item: "Dream! Soratomo Happi!", "Relaxing in My Room" Wide Rubber Mat!", "Matching Smartphone Ring with Sora!", and "Sorasaurs Cosplay Sora-chan Plushie!". This is an accurate transcription. The user then says: "ASMRボイス、ボイスタイトル「届いてるよ、きみの応援」" (ASMR voice, titled "I can hear your support."), I also transcribe the mention of the "Full Set Purchase Bonus".

Then, I'm checking the following, since the user is an expert: I need to be exact about this.

I must transcribe precisely the user stating, "大急ぎで駆け足で！ 11月ワンマンライブのときのそら生誕記念先行チケット販売開始！" which means, "In a hurry, let's be quick! Pre-sales have begun for the Tokino Sora Birthday
